name: AI Image Generation
description: Add AI image generation to any app. Covers DALL-E 3 for quality, Replicate Flux for speed, prompt engineering patterns, generated image storage in S3/Cloudflare R2, and a React gallery component.

steps.description: Install OpenAI, Replicate, and S3 clients
Create generateImage(prompt, model) — supports DALL-E 3 and Replicate Flux, returns URL
Create storeImage(url) that fetches the generated image and uploads to R2/S3 with unique key
Create POST /api/generate with rate limiting, prompt moderation, generate, store, return URL
Create gallery with masonry layout, download button, and share link
Add OPENAI_API_KEY, REPLICATE_API_TOKEN, R2_BUCKET_URL, and R2_ACCESS_KEY

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Generate, edit, and vary images with DALL-E 3 and Replicate Flux
